name: Mia Tasks
description: The user-facing task layer for an executive assistant — a curated, persistent shared to-do list (priority, due date, owner, stakeholder, status) on top of Mia. Adds the managed to-do list OpenClaw's run registry and inferred commitments don't provide.

defaultPriority.description: Priority given to a new task when the user doesn't specify one. Default: normal.
